title: hildmannia occulta
side_effects: Hildmannia occulta can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing nausea, dizziness, and headaches in some individuals. In severe cases, excessive consumption of the plant's extracts can lead to liver damage and impaired kidney function. Additionally, improper use of Hildmannia occulta may cause allergic reactions, such as skin rashes, itching, and respiratory issues in sensitive individuals. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using Hildmannia occulta for any health-related purposes to avoid potential adverse effects.
